displayNameZh: 透过粉丝对 KOL 的信任转移到产品
summary: Yt Trust Transfer component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的透过粉丝对 KOL 的信任转移到产品组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-trust-transfer/src/YtTrustTransfer.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtTrustTransfer` and `ytTrustTransferDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Trust Transfer Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-trust-transfer to my project. Preserve the exported YtTrustTransferProps API and register the YtTrustTransfer composition with the default props.
